title: Craftable Campfire
description: (Re)Adds the minecraft campfire recipe. Meant to be used in cases where the recipe is removed (such as with No Tree Punching)
body: (Re)Adds the minecraft campfire recipe. Meant to be used with [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching) that removes the recipe, or any other similar scenario where the campfire recipe is removed.
